steps.what_happened: The Salesforce home page is displayed.
steps.why_this_action: The video starts with the Salesforce home page already loaded.
steps.preconditions: Salesforce is open and the user is logged in.
steps.visual_feedback: The Salesforce home page is visible.

steps.why_this_action: To view the list of accounts (clients).
steps.preconditions: The Salesforce home page is displayed.
steps.visual_feedback: The Accounts page loads, displaying a list of accounts.

target_element.description: Dropdown to select a list view

steps.what_happened: The list view dropdown is opened.
steps.why_this_action: To select a different list view for accounts.
steps.visual_feedback: A dropdown menu appears with a list of available list views.

steps.what_happened: The list view is changed to 'My Buyers'.
steps.why_this_action: To view the list of buyers.
steps.preconditions: The list view dropdown is open.
steps.visual_feedback: The Accounts page updates to display the 'My Buyers' list view.

steps.why_this_action: To view the list of properties.
steps.visual_feedback: The Properties page loads, displaying a list of properties.

target_element.description: Dropdown to select a list view

steps.what_happened: The list view dropdown is opened.
steps.why_this_action: To select a different list view for properties.
steps.visual_feedback: A dropdown menu appears with a list of available list views.

target_element.description: All Live Properties (Last 30 days) List View

steps.what_happened: The list view is changed to 'All Live Properties (Last 30 days)'.
steps.why_this_action: To view the list of all live properties from the last 30 days.
steps.preconditions: The list view dropdown is open.
steps.visual_feedback: The Properties page updates to display the 'All Live Properties (Last 30 days)' list view.

steps.what_happened: Navigated back to the Home page.
steps.why_this_action: To return to the main Salesforce home page.
steps.visual_feedback: The Salesforce home page is displayed.

workflow_summary: The video provides a brief overview of the Salesforce home page, highlighting key sections and functionalities such as accounts, properties, training hub, property filters, target calculation, and performance dashboard.
potential_variations: The home page layout and available features may vary depending on the user's role (DA, manager, agent) and the specific Salesforce configuration.
error_handling_observed: No error handling was observed in this video.
